_comment: Portfolio data for Ihjas Ahammad - Updated with new AI-generated and personal branding videos

videos.name: AI Generated - Delhi Air Pollution
videos.description: An AI-generated visual narrative portraying Delhi's hazardous air pollution and its effects on residents. The video captures respiratory health risks, indoor exposure, and growing urgency for intervention.

videos.name: AI Generated - Kerala Union Budget
videos.description: This AI-generated video highlights public frustration in Kerala following 2026 Union Budget, focusing on concerns over neglected infrastructure, unmet promises, and demands for fair development.

videos.name: AI Generated - Perfect Moment
videos.description: A cinematic B-roll video illustrating the mindset of waiting for 'perfect moment' and importance of taking action despite uncertainty.

videos.name: AI Generated - Knowing vs Doing
videos.description: A motivational video highlighting the gap between knowing and doing, emphasizing that real progress comes from taking action rather than just collecting knowledge.

videos.name: Behind the Scenes to Public
videos.description: A video documenting the transition from working behind the scenes to building in public, focusing on transparency, consistency, and sharing the creative process.

videos.name: Wedding Cinematic
videos.description: Cinematic wedding video highlighting key moments and emotions of the special day.

videos.name: College Programme Energy
videos.description: This video highlights the energy and excitement of a college programme through dynamic event coverage and editing.

videos.name: College Programme Performances
videos.description: College programme video featuring performances, crowd moments, and event highlights.

videos.name: School Programme Promotion
videos.description: A promotional video created for a school programme, highlighting key activities and building excitement for the event.

videos.name: Framer vs Webflow
videos.description: A video explaining the difference between Framer and Webflow, emphasizing choosing tools based on project needs rather than direct comparison.

videos.name: Moving to Bali
videos.description: A reflective video documenting the experience of moving to Bali and unexpected isolation that followed despite hopes of becoming more social.

videos.name: Determination and Growth
videos.description: A motivational video highlighting determination, mindset, and journey toward personal growth.

videos.name: Perseverance and Self-Improvement
videos.description: Motivational video focused on perseverance and self-improvement.

videos.name: Motivational Mindset
videos.description: This video showcases a person's motivation, emphasizing discipline, effort, and staying focused on goals.
